channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 50 inch mirror, 22nd April
item.description:
This mirror has been dumped in front of my house.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Keyworth Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garbage on sidewalk, 22nd April
item.description:
A bunch of garbage is accumulating on the sidewalk by the bike shelter. Can this be cleared up?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunlace Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped black bags, 22nd April
item.description:
Hi. 2 black bags have been dumped in front of 53 woodbank road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodbank Road, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Coop dumping trolleys and garbage, 22nd April
item.description:
Coop have constantly been using the footpath for trolleys and leave garbage on the footpath overnight. Appreciate it does get collected eventually but the footpath is in constant use by them. Southwark Council has been informed about it but turn a blind eye. Fox has been spotted rummaging through the garbage in the trolley overnight.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tooley Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bulk KFC food dumped, 22nd April
item.description:
A large bag of KFC chicken and other food from KFC dumped next to the already overflowing dustbin. Rats, mice and foxes are having a field day. Shocking to see the borough turning into a labour run looking borough. Top of Churchfield road in Weling

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree fallen in the road, 22nd April
item.description:
A tree has fallen into the road on Maylands drive near the corner of Pembury crescent. Catching phone lines.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30,30A, Maylands Drive, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The SUDS planter by the low traffic filter is being missed resulting in an accumulation of litter, cigarette butts and small plastic waste this section of Barnabas Road is also an important link to the local centre of Well Street, with regular footfall., 22nd April
item.description:
The SUDS planter by the low traffic filter is being missed resulting in an accumulation of litter, cigarette butts and small plastic waste this section of Barnabas Road is also an important link to the local centre of Well Street, with regular footfall.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnabas Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Falling tree., 22nd April
item.description:
There is a old dead tree in my garden that needs immediate attention. There are constant falling branches, I have a baby in the house playing in the garden. This is a serious danger to her.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hazard food waste, 22nd April
item.description:
Between the post box and litter bins there is a massive food Pile of chicken and other food waste left open to the elements/exposed. Inviting rats/foxes and other vermin. Its absolutely disgusting. Definitely a health hazard and needs to be addressed urgently. Children and elderly people often walk down churchfield Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Churchfield Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree in road, 22nd April
item.description:
Tree fallen in middle of road. Danger
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31,31A, Maylands Drive, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Regular fly tipping spot - corner of alley, 22nd April
item.description:
This little corner regularly fills up with rubbish that doesnt get cleared - may need a ‘no fly tipping sign’

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rockmount Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big pile of rubbish on corner, 22nd April
item.description:
Been here at least a month, stinks to high heaven

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rockmount Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is causing movement to our property., 22nd April
item.description:
Tree is causing movement to 133 Mackenzie Road. we are not looking to submit a claim with the council for compensation. we are looking for the council to remove the tree.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mackenzie Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 10 Plympton Road, 22nd April
item.description:
Dumped carpet.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plympton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: No safe crossing for children coming from nursery, 22nd April
item.description:
Thames water roadworks have closed the zebra crossing. They put in a temporary pedestrian crossing but switched it off. Now it’s very dangerous to cross.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pembury Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Debris from bin, 22nd April
item.description:
I reported thee bin had not been emptied and now the bin seems to have been emptied for pick up but it has not been picked up and the rubbish is spreading because of the foxes etc. the road sweeper just walks past it and the council truck that empties this bin just drives past it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 22nd April
item.description:
And dog poo

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Homerton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubish, 22nd April
item.description:
Dumped rubish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Derby Hill, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped, 22nd April
item.description:
Dumped fridge freezer

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Willow Way, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Servo refuse bags ripped and strewn on street, 22nd April
item.description:
Bags left by bin ripped open and rubbish strewn on street and in housing estate.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 126, Dalberg Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
